title: AI Filmmaking Tutorial: Character Consistency Fixed!
summary: ImagineArt Film Studio is an AI filmmaking platform that addresses character consistency across shots through storyboard mode and character locking. The platform offers multi-shot generation with camera presets, an Extend feature for longer shots, and a built-in timeline editor, enabling complete film production in a browser without external software.
